articles.author: Stephan Bisaha
articles.title: A trip to Europe? In this economy? Expensive flights keep vacations closer to home - NPR
articles.description: Travel advisers are seeing Americans picking cheaper domestic travel destinations over Europe.
articles.content:
Stay up to date with our Up First newsletter sent every weekday morning.
If there's anything as painfully expensive right now as buying a ticket for a concert, it's buying one for a flight.
